vehicle.label: Long-Range Surveillance Wing

generated_parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)

verify.value: All required features and interfaces are present.
verify.rule: Each risk item needs: id, desc, mit

verify.value: Estimated mass is 500g, within expected range.
verify.rule: verify must include a mass/budget check.

verify.value: All P0 internal_feature_targets are referenced in geometry_ops.
verify.rule: P0 internal_feature_targets appear as part_tree children and geometry_ops ids or targets.

verify.value: All interfaces have reciprocal naming and matching joint families.
verify.rule: name exact neighboring subsystem labels when they mate, and choose connection_type + DOF + clearance_mm + required_feature so the neighbor can declare the same joint family back.

verify.value: Torque values and preload evidence are provided for critical joints.
verify.rule: critical joints need visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent.

verify.value: Boundary conditions include fixture points, thermal zones, and pressure faces.
verify.rule: verify must include a boundary_conditions object: fixture_points [{at:[x,y,z], type:fixed|pinned|roller}], thermal_zones [{at:[x,y,z], W_or_degC:number, role:source|sink}], pressure_faces [{face:string, Pa:number}] for downstream CFD/FEA.

risk.desc: Potential for thermal expansion mismatch between CFRP and EPP foam core.
risk.mit: Monitor thermal expansion coefficients and adjust design as needed.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient preload or torque leading to joint loosening.
risk.mit: Conduct pre-flight torque checks and use locking washers.

risk.desc: Risk of spar bending under extreme load conditions.
risk.mit: Perform stress analysis and reinforce spar if necessary.

risk.desc: Risk of improper alignment during assembly.
risk.mit: Use alignment tools and follow assembly sequence carefully.

risk.desc: Risk of dust accumulation in service access panels.
risk.mit: Design access panels to be easily cleaned and sealed.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Main spar, ribs, carry-through, fuselage frames; continuous load path
physics_paths: Load path: wing bending loads transfer from spar to carry-through to fuselage frames
Flow path: air flow over wing surface
Thermal path: heat transfer from wing surface to spar
Motion path: wing flexure during flight
Pressure path: aerodynamic pressure on wing surface
integration_opportunities: Potential for additional ribs and stiffeners to enhance structural integrity
Option to integrate additional sensors or avionics in the spar
Possible inclusion of service access ports for maintenance

manufacturing_strategy.datum: Primary locating faces and rail guides
manufacturing_strategy.tolerance: H7/h6 fit class for all critical interfaces
manufacturing_strategy.support: Support structures designed for FDM process
manufacturing_strategy.inspection: Visual inspection for alignment and fit

verification_focus: Check spar socket fit and clearance
Inspect center joint bolt holes for correct diameter and depth
Ensure rib and carry-through alignment with spar
Confirm frame integration with wing root structure

generated_parts.label: Wing Rib Set x 12

verify.value: All required features and interfaces are present.
verify.rule: All required evidence_features must be included in the part_tree/geometry_ops.
The subsystem mass must be within the design constraints.

verify.value: All P0 internal_feature_targets are present in the geometry_ops.
verify.rule: P0 internal_feature_targets must be traceable to specific geometry_ops.

verify.value: All interfaces are reciprocal with neighboring subsystems.
verify.rule: Adjacent interfaces must have matching connection_type, DOF, and clearance_mm.

verify.value: Visible locking evidence is present for all critical joints.
verify.rule: Critical joints need visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence.

risk.desc: Risk of thermal stress due to temperature extremes.
risk.mit: Implement thermal management strategies and monitor temperature during operation.

risk.desc: Risk of load path discontinuity at wing root.
risk.mit: Ensure continuous load path from spar to fuselage frames with fittings at every load transfer point.

risk.desc: Risk of improper assembly sequence leading to misalignment.
risk.mit: Define and follow a clear assembly sequence with tool, torque, and datum per step.

risk.desc: Risk of dimensional inaccuracy due to FDM process limitations.
risk.mit: Use consistent FDM settings and conduct dimensional checks post-manufacture.

risk.desc: Risk of environmental seal failure due to dust and humidity.
risk.mit: Select appropriate seal materials and design for minimal exposure to harsh conditions.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Wing planform, airfoil section evidence, winglets, elevon/control surface cutouts with hinges

physics_paths.path: Wing spar to wing rib, then rib to wing skin
Sunlight to rib surface, then to wing core
Atmospheric pressure on wing skin, transmitted to rib
Access for maintenance through wing skin cutouts

risk.mit: Implement thermal management features such as heat sinks and airflow channels

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Slide-in li-ion battery pack bay on CG rail, BMS and connector access
physics_paths: Load path: CG rail to battery bay shell, then to wing spar
Thermal path: Battery heat through bay shell to wing skin
Flow path: Airflow around battery bay shell
Motion path: Slide rail for battery bay insertion/removal
Pressure path: External pressure on battery bay shell
Human access path: Top access hatch to service battery bay
Electrical/data path: XT60 connector to BMS access
integration_opportunities: Battery bay can be upgraded with different capacity batteries
Top hatch can be replaced with a different material for weight savings
CG rail marks can be adjusted for different payload configurations
